next_agent_prompt:
You are taking over a memd hive handoff.
Start by reading .memd/wake.md, then run memd hive --summary and memd hive follow --session <your-session> --summary before edits.
Handoff from session: worker-a
Handoff from worker: codex
Target session: worker-b
Target worker: claude-code
Task: task-proof-14af7333-57ba-42e6-b9a0-1c2d25ed6ff1
Topic: Proof task
Scopes: scope:proof:2d6a71d5-442e-439f-a1ba-1aa9028bc005
Next action: review proof task
Note: handoff from proof
Before changing files or running shared dev/build commands, publish heartbeat and check hive board for collisions.
Keep memd and ClawControl separate: do not launch ClawControl, Tauri, Vite, or app dev servers for memd work; sibling ClawControl processes are awareness only unless the user explicitly asks otherwise.
Before broad Git, Cargo, test, or repo-scan work, run scripts/memd-host-io-guard.sh; exit 75 means wait and report the blocker scope/project_hint.
Treat host_process_scan_timeout or project_hint=host-process-scan as blocked host awareness, not as safe-to-proceed.
Treat project_hint=app-git, cargo-tooling, native-tooling, or node-tooling as host/app-owned blocker classes; coordinate or wait instead of killing unrelated apps.
Treat project_hint=host-io-report state=cached as a read-only cached blocker governed by MEMD_HOST_IO_REPORT_TTL_SECS; do not refresh its timestamp without a fresh scan.
For a cheap continuity packet, run scripts/memd-continuity-status.sh; it reads wake, deploy preflight, live-map, and host guard without broad Git/Cargo.
For deploy checks, run scripts/deploy-memd-server-preflight.sh; on /Volumes it must report MEMD_GIT_DIRTY=unknown with MEMD_GIT_STATUS_BLOCKERS unless a fresh clear host report exists.
Use .memd/state/codebase-live-map.json and .memd/state/codebase-live-map-events.ndjson as the live diff surface; record hook/file paths before waiting for heartbeat.
If memd lookup stalls, bound it with MEMD_LOOKUP_REMOTE_TIMEOUT_MS; lookup should fall back to local wake/live-map/host-guard continuity instead of hanging.
When codebase-live-map.json says status=blocked or reread_required=true, treat that as current shared state and do not reread the whole repo until the host guard is clear.
Check MEMD_CODEBASE_LIVE_MAP_FRESH, MEMD_CODEBASE_LIVE_MAP_AGE_SECS, MEMD_CODEBASE_LIVE_MAP_TTL_SECS, and MEMD_CODEBASE_LIVE_MAP_ACTION from deploy preflight; follow ACTION before trusting or rereading codebase state.
Need review on shared task task-review-44b115b4-e82e-4b14-9cb9-37a2192cb5f6. Please inspect the task before handoff.
